MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Olan Lambert ; Clerk: L. Fong; Matter Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances on Wednesday, August 27, 2014:
Plaintiff Ovays Patel is present and appearing in Propria Persona.
Defendant Justin Lim Sah (sued as Justin Kim Sah) is present with Attorney Steven A. Rutkowski, III representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants, and/or counsel confer in Room 501A for settlement discussions.
This case does not settle. The trial date of September 2, 2014 remains on calendar.
